title: [Comments of the German Society for Orthopaedic Rheumatology on the article "Rheumatological care in Germany" : Memorandum of the German Society for Rheumatology and Clinical Immunology 2024].
author_string: Carl, Hans-Dieter, Arbogast, Martin, Gaulke, Ralph, Deutsche Gesellschaft für Orthopädische Rheumatologie (DGORh)
abstract: The following comment from the German Society of Orthopedic Rheumatology refers to the Memorandum from The German Society of Rheumatology as pubsished in 2024.
